title: Chinese Buddhist: Identity of Relative and Absolute (Shitou) (4)
description: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Identity of Relative and Absolute (Shitou)
introduction: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Identity of Relative and Absolute (Shitou)

translation.text: From Identity of Relative and Absolute (Shitou): A core text of Chinese Buddhism, transmitted through the great translation period and forming the basis of East Asian Buddhist practice.
